# FlowBoard-test
## Description
FlowBoard-test is an AI-powered project management platform designed to help engineering teams accelerate project delivery. FlowBoard-test offers intelligent sprint planning, predictive analytics, and automated workflows to improve efficiency and productivity.

## Topics
- Project management software
- DevOps tools
- AI in project management
- Sprint planning
- Predictive analytics
- Workflow automation
- Engineering team productivity
- Agile project management
